params.text: {{ [app for app in CTX.enterprise_apps_response.data.value if 'HideApp' not in app.tags and app.displayName in CTX.app_names_to_hide] }}

{{ {"success": false, "apps_to_hide": [app.displayName for app in CTX.apps_to_hide], "apps_successfully_hidden": [], "errors": [{"error": "One or more apps failed to be hidden", "details": TASKS.hide_apps.result.result}], "summary": {"total_requested": CTX.apps_to_hide | length, "total_hidden": 0, "total_errors": CTX.apps_to_hide | length}} }}

{{ {"success": false, "apps_to_hide": [], "apps_successfully_hidden": [], "errors": [{"error": "Failed to list enterprise apps from Entra ID", "details": TASKS.list_enterprise_apps.result.result}], "summary": {"total_requested": 0, "total_hidden": 0, "total_errors": 1}} }}

{{ {"success": true, "apps_to_hide": [], "apps_successfully_hidden": [], "errors": [], "summary": {"total_requested": 0, "total_hidden": 0, "total_errors": 0, "message": "No matching visible enterprise apps found to hide."}} }}

{{ {"success": true, "apps_to_hide": [app.displayName for app in CTX.apps_to_hide], "apps_successfully_hidden": [app.displayName for app in CTX.apps_to_hide], "errors": [], "summary": {"total_requested": CTX.apps_to_hide | length, "total_hidden": CTX.apps_to_hide | length, "total_errors": 0}} }}

nonfunctional_fields.name: [BEZ - TASK] Entra: Hide System Enterprise Apps
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].description: PATCH each identified service principal to add HideApp tag, making it hidden from users
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].name: hide_apps
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].next[0].label: all apps hidden
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[0].next[1].label: some apps failed
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].description: List all enterprise apps (service principals with WindowsAzureActiveDirectoryIntegratedApp tag) from Entra ID
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].name: list_enterprise_apps
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].next[0].label: failure
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[1].next[1].label: success
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].description: Filter enterprise apps to find those currently visible (no HideApp tag) that match the input app names list
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].name: set_apps_to_hide
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].next[0].label: apps found to hide
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[2].next[1].label: no apps to hide
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].description: Build structured failure response when one or more PATCH operations failed
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[3].name: set_failure_result
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].description: Build structured error response when listing enterprise apps fails
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[4].name: set_list_error_result
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].description: Build structured response when no matching visible apps were found to hide
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[5].name: set_no_apps_result
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].description: Build structured success response after all apps were hidden successfully
nonfunctional_fields.tasks[6].name: set_success_result
